nodes.text:
(alias) function createClient<transport extends Transport, chain extends Chain | undefined = undefined, accountOrAddress extends Account | Address | undefined = undefined, rpcSchema extends RpcSchema | undefined = undefined>(parameters: ClientConfig<transport, chain, accountOrAddress, rpcSchema>): Prettify<Client<transport, chain, accountOrAddress extends Address ? Prettify<JsonRpcAccount<accountOrAddress>> : accountOrAddress, rpcSchema>>
import createClient

(alias) function http<rpcSchema extends RpcSchema | undefined = undefined, raw extends boolean = false>(url?: string | undefined, config?: HttpTransportConfig<rpcSchema, raw>): HttpTransport<rpcSchema, raw>
import http
tags: Creates a HTTP transport that connects to a JSON-RPC API.

nodes.docs: Creates a Tempo payment method for usage on the server.
tags:
```ts
import { tempo } from 'mpay/server'

const method = tempo({
  rpcUrl: 'https://rpc.tempo.xyz',
  chainId: 42431,
})
```
